title: Farms
description: Increase crops growing speed, autocollect crops. Collect drops near the minion and more
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b4026cf32c0181d71cda5850077bc1bcc155191.png)

![Features: Every function of the plugin can be controlled with a simple GUI. The plugin doesn't require any dependency to work. You can set prices for everything with the Vault economy hook. You can customize every aspect of the plugin. Inventories, messages and more... The plugin provides a powerful api to create and manage farms. You can export the farm to an item so you can sell it in shops and more..](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/966e3db699ba2a9101c83dbbd902eab48f9059c1.png)

![Auto Collect](https://i.imgur.com/n3cIJFE.gif)
![Create Farms](https://i.imgur.com/SHTyF8c.gif)
![Increase Farm Level](https://i.imgur.com/2Xdgrqy.gif)
![Support almost every block](https://i.imgur.com/4Z2wNiR.gif)

## **API**


```xml
<repository>
    <id>lorenzo</id>
    <url>https://dl.lorenzo0111.me/releases/</url>
</repository>

<dependency>
    <groupId>me.lorenzo0111</groupId>
    <artifactId>FarmsAPI</artifactId>
    <version>1.7</version>
    <scope>provided</scope>
</dependency>
```

```gradle
repositories {
  maven { url = uri("https://dl.lorenzo0111.me/releases/") }
}
    
dependencies {
   compileOnly "me.lorenzo0111:FarmsAPI:1.7"
}
```


**Tags:** Farming plugin, robots plugin, minions pluign.
